validate.notes: ENVIRONMENT BROKEN: Bash tool is completely unusable in this session - every command (including 'echo test') fails with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env'. The harness cannot create its session-env directory, so no shell commands can execute. Cannot run docker build, NOP test, gold test, or rubric judge. File reads/edits work but validation requires Docker which requires bash. Previous validate run (from earlier session) reported pass with nop=0/gold=1, but subsequent fix_quality node modified files and was rate-limited mid-run, so current state is unverified. Recommend retry in a fresh sandbox.
